title: License, display and location
doc_html:
§2587.  License, display and location

Each license issued hereunder shall be kept conspicuously posted in the place of business of the licensee.  The business address may be changed by any license upon ten days prior written notice to the director.  

Acts 1970, No. 423, §7.
